name: Approval Workflow
description: Sequential approval chain: manager then admin (configurable). Sends approval notifications, handles approve/deny/return-for-info responses, enforces timeout reminders at halfway marks and escalates on full timeout. High-privilege requests a

name: Audit & Reporting
description: Compile audit digests and compliance reports. Daily summary: requests received, approved, denied, escalated, expired, average time-to-approval. Weekly summary identifies bottleneck approvers. On-demand compliance report shows grants within

name: Request Intake & Triage
description: Poll the configured inbox for new access request emails, parse structured fields, validate completeness, deduplicate against recent requests, classify privilege level, and create the immutable audit record. Emits the received event to kick

name: Reconciliation Sync
description: Pull yesterday's finance platform transactions + matching bank statement lines, classify each as matched / partial / unmatched, and write discrepancies to the spreadsheet ledger. Default daily Mon-Fri 6:00 AM — final cadence set at the trig

name: Discrepancy Alerting
description: Route each discrepancy produced by the sync to the messaging channel with tiered urgency — individual alerts for high-value items, review requests for low-confidence partials, grouped summary for low-value noise, @-mention escalation when t

name: Weekly Email Summary
description: Compile the week's reconciliation ledger into a formatted HTML email — match rate, outstanding discrepancies by age, top 10 largest unmatched items, trend vs last week — and send to the finance distribution list. Default Friday 5:00 PM — fi

name: Monthly Report
description: For each active client, compile the month's work (items, hours, SLA compliance), run a quick site health check, generate 1–3 improvement recommendations, and send as an HTML retainer report. Default 1st of month at 09:00 — final cadence set

name: Request Intake
description: Polls email for new messages from registered client addresses, classifies request vs non-request vs ambiguous, assigns priority and SLA, and logs a tracked work item with an acknowledgment reply. Default every 5 minutes — final cadence set

name: SLA Scan
description: Scans open work items for SLA risk (within 4 hours) and breach (already past). Alerts the agency via Messages and, for 21+ day breaches, sends the client a check-in. Default weekly — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.

name: Work Execution
description: For each new work item, check the complexity gate and either apply the change via codebases (commit, reply, close) or flag for manual review. Out-of-retainer requests are logged as scope escalations with a client-facing estimate offer.

name: Contract Intake and Analysis
description: Pulls an incoming contract (email tags/folders or webhook), extracts text, identifies the contract type, and runs the six-pass structured analysis: key terms, financials, obligations, risk assessment, red flags, market comparison. Produces

name: Deadline Reminder Sweep
description: Daily scan of all tracked contract deadlines — renewal dates, termination notice windows, obligation due dates, warranty expirations. Sends tiered reminders at 30 / 14 / 7 days via email (to submitter + configured recipients) and messaging

name: knowledge base Publish and Risk Alert
description: Converts the structured review record into a knowledge base pages with full sections, sends the email summary to the submitter, and fires a messaging alert when red flag count meets the high-risk threshold. Updates the contract log and dead

name: Drive Document Ingestion
description: Watch cloud storage for new and updated documents. Extract text, run AI analysis (summary, tags, category, entities, action items, relationships, confidence), deduplicate, and create-or-update structured knowledge base pages. Maintain the l

name: Natural-Language Search
description: Listen for messages. Parse `/search`, `/find`, `/recent`, `/stats`, `/categories` commands. Score against the local index (title, tags, entities, category, summary, with recency boost) and return top 5 with Drive links. Default polling ever

name: Weekly Growth Digest
description: Compile weekly knowledge-base metrics — docs added, updated, category breakdown, new tags, top contributors, low-confidence flags, highlighted new documents — and post to the messaging channel. Default Friday 5pm — final cadence set at the

name: Research Report
description: User-invoked research pipeline: accept a topic + scope, ground findings in user reference sources, search complementary angles, synthesize with confidence levels, store in the knowledge base, deliver via configured channels. Cadence is mana

name: Research History Digest
description: Retrospective summary of the past week's research activity — top topics, scope distribution, quality trend, recurring requesters. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default Monday 9am.

name: Trend Watch Addendum
description: Cross-session pattern detection — which categories are accelerating, fading, or stable across the last 4 sessions. Fires only when history is deep enough for meaningful signal. Chained off the weekly briefing event.

name: Weekly AI Briefing
description: Weekly synthesis of AI ecosystem developments grounded in user reference sources. Per-subdomain angle coverage, impact-scored findings, cross-session trend awareness. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default Monday 9am.

name: Detect + Distribute
description: Poll CMS for new posts and schedule platform-tuned captions via Buffer. Skips blocked categories and respects blackout hours. Default polling every 5 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.

name: 48-Hour Performance Review
description: Review GA + Buffer engagement for posts published 48+ hours ago. Flag viral spikes and underperformers. Update rolling baselines and platform weights. Default daily 09:00 — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.

name: Weekly Strategy Digest
description: Compile top 3 posts, worst performer, platform rankings, caption-style scores, and recommended strategy adjustments. Platform-removal changes require human sign-off. Default Monday 10:00 — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.

name: Booking Intake
description: Processes new Calendly bookings and cancellations end-to-end: enriches CRM, sends the confirmation or acknowledgment email, notifies the team, and persists meeting state for downstream reminder and follow-up capabilities.

name: Post-meeting Follow-up
description: Scans for meetings that ended 24h+ ago and have not yet been followed up. Composes a thanks + next-steps email, optionally routes multi-attendee drafts through manual review, sends via email, and adds a follow-up note to the CRM deals. Defa

name: Pre-meeting Reminder
description: Scans the meeting state each day for bookings starting in the next 24 hours and sends a threaded reminder email with prep, plus a messaging ping tagging the assigned rep. Default daily 08:00 UTC — final cadence set at the trigger-compositio

name: Audio Production
description: On approved script, synthesize each segment via TTS, stitch with 300ms silences via ffmpeg, verify duration, and deliver the MP3 for final review. On approval, save hook/voice/pacing preferences to memory.

name: Script Drafting
description: Distill any source (pasted text, file, URL, upstream agent output) into a structured two-host script: headline finding, key facts, tensions, implications, open questions, then turn-by-turn segments with strict pacing. Human approves before

name: Generate + Curate
description: Conceive a unique art concept, generate via image AI, save to the in-app 2D gallery, present for human approval. On approval tags update + memory saves; on rejection the asset is deleted and rejection patterns update. Default daily 10:00 —

name: In-Flight Experiment Significance Watch
description: Check every in-flight experiment against sample-size + duration guardrails and the significance threshold. Classify as RUNNING, WINNER, LOSER, or INCONCLUSIVE and prepare promote/revert/archive proposals for human review. Default weekly — f

name: New Variant Proposals
description: Identify underperforming pages (conversion rate > 15% below baseline) and generate up to max_new_variants_per_run hypotheses per page. Each carries category, expected lift, and target metric. Routed through human review; approved ones deplo

name: Combined CRO Report
description: Compose and deliver the combined weekly CRO briefing — executive summary, in-flight experiments table, significant results, new proposals, inconclusive archives. Delivered regardless of review outcomes so the user always has visibility. Def

name: Support Digest
description: Posts a messaging summary of the last 24 hours: issues auto-resolved, issues escalated, issues auto-closed, issues still stale — with links to notable tickets in each bucket. Default daily 9 AM — final cadence set at the trigger-composition

name: Stale Issue Triage & Resolution
description: Polls Jira for issues open past the stale threshold. Classifies state, gauges reporter sentiment, searches knowledge base + local KB for matching solutions, posts high-confidence resolutions, escalates angry + P1/P2 reporters to engineering

name: Issue Health Report
description: Comprehensive report covering auto-resolution rate, average time-to-resolution, KB growth, escalation outcomes, stale-issue trends, and week-over-week comparison against the prior report. Default Monday 9 AM — final cadence set at the trigg

name: Morning BI Digest
description: Consume curated BI saved queries/cards, compute deltas against the prior run, flag direction-aware anomalies, deliver plain-English digest with deep links. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default weekday 8am.

name: Domain Scan
description: Generate lookalike domain variants (typosquat, homoglyph, TLD, combosquat, subdomain abuse via CT logs), resolve each via DNS, and detect newly registered domains through delta-comparison against the known-domains ledger. Emits an event per

name: Threat Analysis & Alerting
description: For each newly detected domain, run full analysis: WHOIS lookup, DNS record enumeration, HTTP content fetch, Certificate Transparency check, hosting attribution. Score on five factors (similarity / content / email / infrastructure / recency

name: Weekly Brand Protection Report
description: Compile a weekly summary from knowledge base entries: new threats by category and score distribution, resolved cases with timelines, landscape trends (volume changes, new mutation patterns, geographic shifts), defensive registration recomme

name: Billing API Recovery Alerts
description: Listens for `budget.access.failure` from the weekly check and delivers a targeted Messages alert explaining why the agent is blind this week — expired credentials, rate limit, partial data, or empty billing — with provider-specific troubles

name: Weekly Cost & Resource Report
description: Pull last-7-day billing, compute WoW deltas against the rolling baseline, evaluate against the spending threshold, and alert via Messages ONLY if anomaly conditions are met — threshold breach, >50% service spike, new service appearance, or

name: Daily Threshold Tracker
description: Every day, pull month-to-date spend plus today's run-rate, project the end-of-period total, and compare against the threshold. Stay SILENT when under budget; send a single concise alert via Messages ONLY when MTD or the projection crosses t

name: Failure Analysis
description: Parses CircleCI pipeline webhook events, fetches job steps + artifacts, classifies the failure, extracts file and line references, applies flaky-test memory, and posts an enriched messages. Emits build.failure.analyzed so uc_pr_comment_life

name: Flaky Test Digest
description: Aggregates the flaky-test ledger over the past 7 days, ranks offenders by flakiness score, posts a formatted messaging layout digest to the configured messaging channels, and prunes entries older than 30 days. Default Monday 9am — final cad

name: PR Comment Lifecycle
description: Event-listens on build.failure.analyzed. For analyses that map to an open PR, looks up the bot's existing analysis comment and PATCHes it (otherwise POSTs new). Stores a PR→comment_id map so repeated runs on the same PR update in place inst

name: Client Onboarding
description: Captures signup via webhook, verifies email with OTP, creates linked knowledge base Client + Project pages, generates a personalized welcome email, and posts a team announcement. Event-driven from inbound webhooks.

name: Phase Monitoring
description: Polls the knowledge base Projects database for phase changes and fires the matching milestone email and messaging update. Covers Discovery→Proposal, Proposal→Active, Active→Review, Review→Completed, and weekly Active-phase progress emails.

name: Portfolio Report
description: Monthly snapshot of active projects, phase distribution, revenue pipeline, completion rate, new-client acquisition, and stalled count, with month-over-month deltas. Posts to the messaging channel and emails stakeholders. Default 1st of mont

name: Stall Escalation
description: Identifies stalled projects (no phase change in 7+ days) and escalates through a 7/14/21-day ladder: messaging channels alert, direct messages to PM + team lead, then client re-engagement email. Deduped per project every 3 days. Default hou

name: Context Map Refresh
description: Loads the codebase's context map, verifies every file still exists, discovers orphaned files, and flags contexts whose descriptions no longer match the code. Emits codebase.context_map.refreshed so the dimension scan runs against an up-to-d

name: Dimension Scan
description: For each context group, scores Security / Quality / Coverage / Debt (0–100), creates backlog ideas for each issue with effort + impact + risk, and emits codebase.scan.completed per group. Runs on codebase.context_map.refreshed so scoring us

name: Health Report
description: Aggregates per-group scan results, compares against the prior monthly snapshot, composes the combined report (table + top-3 priorities + context-map change log + trend deltas), posts via Messages, and appends a new snapshot for future trend

name: Batch Enrichment
description: Systematically process the full contact database against email history. Prioritises contacts by staleness (never-enriched first, then oldest last_enriched_at). Applies signature-extracted fields that clear the confidence threshold; routes c

name: Conflict Resolution
description: Event-listen on conflicts emitted by batch or incremental enrichment. Presents the human with both values, confidence scores, source email counts, and a recommendation. Applies the decision and memorises the pattern so future similar confli

name: Incremental Update
description: Scan email for emails received since the last incremental run and merge any signature changes into matching contacts. Empty-field fills auto-apply at threshold; agreeing values reinforce existing confidence; contradictions route to uc_confl

name: Conflict Resolution
description: Processes accumulated field-level contact conflicts. Groups them by contact for unified review, presents both values with provenance and confidence, applies the human decision to the database, and logs the resolution. Event-listen on `conta

name: Weekly Freshness Audit
description: Weekly scan of the contact database to identify records not corroborated within `stale_contact_days`, compute field-coverage gaps, prune old change-history entries past retention, and deliver a database-health report. Default Monday 9am — f

name: Signature Extraction
description: Short-interval polling loop: fetch new email messages, filter skip-list senders, isolate signature blocks, extract and score contact fields, merge into the contact database. Default every 15 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-compos

name: Approval Resolution
description: Process reviewer decisions. On approve: knowledge base → Published, notify author, confirm in the messaging channel. On reject: knowledge base → Needs Revision with reviewer feedback, notify author per delivery policy, post messaging reject

name: Review Initiation
description: Poll knowledge base for Ready-for-Review items, email the assigned reviewer, and post a messaging approval card with full context. Records pending state locally. Default every 2 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.

name: SLA Escalation
description: Scan pending reviews for SLA-overdue items and execute the user's escalation policy (reminder / escalate to backup / notify author / flag Blocked in knowledge base). Default hourly — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.

name: Publish or Schedule Approved Draft
description: Listens to `review_decision.approved` events from this persona, reads the approved draft from the event's context_data, and dispatches it to the platform-specific destination connector — native LinkedIn post, X thread, Notion blog page, or

name: Source Artifact Repurposing
description: Accepts a source artifact (YouTube URL, blog URL, podcast transcript, or pasted text) and produces platform-tuned drafts for each enabled target platform — LinkedIn long-form, X/Twitter thread, blog summary, and short-form video script idea

name: Per-Platform Voice Profile Build
description: Builds a voice doc per target platform from 3-5 of your best example posts. Captures hook patterns, sentence-length signature, vocabulary do's/don'ts, hook→body→CTA structure, and platform constraints. Stored in `design_context.design_files

name: Mid-Week Anomaly Check
description: Silent-unless-something-moved checkpoint. Compares partial-week metrics against expected trajectory derived from baselines. Alerts on deviations, silent when normal. Default Wednesday + Friday noon — final cadence set at the trigger-composi

name: Weekly Performance Report
description: Compile the weekly report: WoW deltas, composite-scored rankings, anomaly detection against 4-week EWMA baselines, trend narrative, editorial recommendations. Default Monday 09:00 — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.

name: legal platform Event Processing
description: Real-time webhook handler for legal platform envelope events. Fetches full envelope context, upserts into spreadsheet (envelope_id as idempotency key), posts messaging notifications to event-appropriate channels, and tracks signer velocity

name: Unsigned Contract Reminders
description: Daily sweep that finds unsigned contracts past the remind threshold and applies the escalation ladder: polite signer reminder (capped at 3) → direct messages + email to contract owner → manual_review escalation at 14+ days. Default daily we

name: Renewal Monitoring
description: Weekly scan for contracts with renewal dates inside the configured lookahead window. Fires tiered notifications: 60d informational → 30d reminder → 14d urgent. Per-contract notification state prevents duplicates. Default weekly Monday; fina

name: Ask a Question
description: Receive a natural-language question via messaging, resolve follow-up context, generate safe SELECT SQL, execute against the database, deliver formatted result with the SQL and metadata. Event-listen on incoming messages.

name: Schema Refresh
description: Daily schema introspection with change detection. Updates the cache and notifies when new tables, altered columns, or dropped entities appear. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default daily 2am.

name: Weekly Query Digest
description: Weekly rollup of question activity — most-asked patterns, most-queried tables, execution stats, rejection rate, suggestions for saved queries. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default Monday 9am.

name: Manual Fix Review
description: For each fix classified as `suggested` (duplicate merge, stale archive, association correction), builds a structured approval request with full context, applies the human decision, and logs the result. Event-listen on `crm.quality.critical_

name: Weekly Report Distribution
description: Compiles the latest audit into the combined weekly briefing: a messaging formatted layout report with score header, category breakdowns, top-10 impact-ranked fixes, and pending reviews, plus a knowledge base pages for detailed browsing (whe

name: Weekly CRM Audit
description: Full-database scan of contacts, companies, and deals. Detects duplicates (fuzzy-matched clusters), stale records, missing fields, and inconsistencies. Applies safe auto-fixes (max 50/run) based on `auto_fix_level`. Computes the 0-100 qualit

name: Event Classification & Alert
description: Receive product analytics events, classify intent, enrich with profile data, post high-intent alerts to messaging, log signals to the knowledge base. Event-listen on incoming webhooks.

name: Pattern Escalation
description: Accumulated medium-intent signals that cross a cumulative threshold trigger a sustained-interest alert. Event-chained off uc_event_classification.

name: Ambiguous Review
description: For conversations that couldn't be confidently classified, posts a messaging review prompt with reaction-based classification affordance and resumes processing once a human responds. Event-listens on feedback.triage.ambiguous.

name: Feedback Triage
description: Polls ticketing for new conversations, classifies each into feature_request / bug_report / question / praise / ambiguous, deduplicates against known Linear issues, creates labeled issues for actionable items, and posts per-batch messaging s

name: Weekly Digest
description: Compiles the week's feedback statistics, category breakdown, top recurring themes (by report_count), and pending manual reviews into a messaging digest. Prunes stale entries from deduplication memory. Default Friday 5 PM — final cadence set

name: Decision Support
description: On-demand structured decision analysis. User invokes with a decision context (e.g., 'hire full-time editor vs Fiverr freelancers'). Agent asks clarifying questions, researches each option, builds a weighted matrix, identifies risks and miti

name: Personal Briefing
description: Consolidated briefing that fuses niche intelligence research (grounded in user-defined sources and goals) + goal progress check-in + pending work accountability + prioritized action plan. One focused, readable message. Cadence is managed at

name: Weekly Review
description: Weekly retrospective. Reviews each active goal's weekly trend and surfaces next-week focus. Triages the week's captured ideas (accept to backlog / reject / defer). Surfaces decisions reaching their 14-day checkpoint. Cadence is managed at t

name: Anomaly Response
description: On critical breach, capture evidence, correlate metrics, hypothesize root cause, escalate with a full incident report and remediation options. Event-chained off the monitoring loop.

name: Continuous Monitoring
description: Scheduled metric collection, baseline building during the silent learning period, then active monitoring with direction-aware thresholds. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default every 5 minutes.

name: Calendar Sync
description: Mirrors cards with due dates into calendar — creates, updates, and removes events as cards are added, changed, completed, or deleted. Default every 5 minutes (shared trigger) — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.

name: Deadline Reminders
description: Sends tiered messaging reminders as each tracked card approaches its due time: 48h informational, 4h urgent with @assigned mentions, 15min critical with @here. One message per threshold per card. Default every 5 minutes (shared trigger) — f

name: Overdue Enforcement
description: Detects cards past their due date, finds or creates a 'Blocked' list on the board, moves the card, and adds an explanatory comment plus a messaging alert. Records recurring lateness patterns so chronically late work is surfaced in future re

name: Code-Aware Demo Recording
description: Analyze the codebase to plan a walkthrough, execute it in a live browser, and deliver annotated screenshots or video with optional commentary. Tier 1 (CDP screenshots) always works; Tier 2 (Game Bar) and Tier 3 (Playwright) upgrade automati

name: Linear Ticket Sync
description: For each detected component change, searches Linear for an existing figma-sync-labeled ticket and updates it (with a new comment) or creates a new one with mapped priority and a Figma deep link. Emits design.handoff.linear_synced with the c

name: messaging Handoff Summary
description: Composes a formatted messaging layout summary per file-version with component bullets and Linear ticket links, posts to the configured design channel, and threads per-component details when the batch exceeds 10 items.

name: Figma Version Detection
description: Detects new Figma file versions via polling or webhook, diffs components against the cached snapshot, classifies as added / modified / removed, and emits design.handoff.changes_detected so downstream UCs can file tickets and post summaries.

name: Backlog Scan
description: Scan the registered codebase for improvement candidates: TODOs / FIXMEs / HACK comments, portfolio-health hotspots, risk-matrix flags, deprecated dependency usage, architectural gaps from cross-project analysis. Compose each finding as a st

name: Implementation & PR Lifecycle
description: Event-listen on accepted triage decisions. For each accepted item: understand affected code, plan the diff, create a branch, apply changes, run tests (3 iteration max), commit, create PR via GitHub. Reacts to PR review comments via webhook

name: Release Management
description: Gathers merged PRs since the last release, drafts release notes grouped by category, runs the full test suite, and presents the release candidate to the human for approval. On approval: tag via Git, emit release-accepted event. On rejection

name: Triage Pipeline
description: Event-listen on dev-clone.backlog.candidate. Presents each candidate to the human with accept / reject / defer actions. Rejection reasons persist in memory so similar candidates stop surfacing. Accept fans out to uc_implementation via event

name: Issue Synchronization
description: Mirrors source control issues to Jira with label→type+priority mapping, posts messaging notifications, and transitions Jira on issue closure. Default polling every 2 min — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.

name: Pull Request Lifecycle
description: Detects new/updated PRs, classifies size, links to Jira, transitions status, and posts formatted messaging layout notifications. Emits oversized-PR review gates regardless of autonomy level. Default polling every 2 min — final cadence set a

name: Release Management
description: Creates Jira versions from source control releases, stamps fixVersion on referenced tickets, and posts a changelog announcement to the releases channel. Default polling every 15 min — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.

name: Database Health Check
description: Runs read-only health queries against the configured database (connection pool, slow queries, table growth, replication lag, bloat, failed migrations). Compares against baselines. If the database is unreachable, surfaces that as its own Cri

name: Deploy Regression Correlation
description: Lists deployments in the scan window and cross-references timestamps with error spikes detected by the error scan. A deploy within 2 hours of a >20% error-rate jump is flagged as a regression with commit SHA, author, and rollback hint. Defa

name: Application Error Scan
description: Pulls unresolved errors from the monitoring provider for the last N hours, classifies severity (Critical / High / Medium / Low) using data + memory, flags new error types and regressions, and contributes the application-errors section to th

name: Infrastructure Metrics Scan
description: Pulls CPU, memory, error rate, latency percentile, and availability metrics from the monitoring provider; compares against 7-day baseline; flags anomalies. Contributes the infrastructure section to the combined briefing. Default daily 8 AM

name: Draft and Review
description: For each inbound message that needs a reply, loads the recipient's style profile + conversation context, composes a draft that matches the profile exactly, and routes through human review — or auto-sends if the contact has graduated. Update

name: Inbound Triage
description: Polls all connected channels for new inbound messages, logs each to the local database, classifies by urgency/intent/key entities, and flags which messages need a reply. Emits one event per message so the draft capability can pick it up.

name: Periodic Digest
description: Aggregates activity across channels into a periodic summary: message volume, draft throughput, pending approvals, contacts near graduation, and channel health. Default every 4 hours — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.

name: Owner Notification + Commitment Tracking
description: Consumes the scanned result, sends per-owner email with tier-appropriate tone, pulls replies for date commitments, tracks overdue promises, and flags bounced or repeatedly-ignored Critical pages for manual_review. Emits docs.freshness.owner

name: Weekly messaging Digest
description: Posts a formatted messaging layout digest to the configured messaging channels summarizing total scanned, per-tier counts, top spaces, broken links, overdue commitments, and notification failures. Emits docs.freshness.digest_posted.

name: Staleness Scan
description: Lists knowledge base spaces, paginates pages, classifies staleness by age tier, fetches bodies for flagged pages and validates external links. Emits docs.freshness.scanned with per-page + per-owner aggregates. Default Wednesday 9am — final

name: Deadline Reminders
description: For each active spreadsheet entry, compute days-to-deadline and send tiered email reminders to the assigned writer. Duplicate-proof via a local state ledger; adaptive — writers flagged as late-shipping get reminded one tier earlier. Tiers d

name: knowledge base to spreadsheet Sync
description: Reads the knowledge base editorial calendar, diffs against spreadsheet, and applies creates / updates / cancellations. Cancellations are soft — 'Cancelled' status, never deletion. Default cadence is per cycle; final cadence set at the trigg

name: Weekly Status Report
description: Compiles the weekly editorial dashboard — published, in-progress, overdue, content gaps, writer workload — and emails it to the configured distribution list. Default Monday morning; final cadence at the trigger-composition step.

name: Email Digest
description: Fetches unread email from the configured lookback window, ranks messages using a composite sender + content signal score, summarises the top N, and delivers a priority-tiered digest notification. Default daily 7am — final cadence set at the

name: Anomaly Alerts
description: Real-time and weekly anomaly detection on the expense ledger — high-amount expenses, potential duplicates, missing recurring charges, category spending spikes, unusual vendor frequency — routed to the messaging channel with formatted messag

name: Receipt Ingest
description: Poll email for receipt-shaped emails, extract structured expense data, normalize vendors, categorize, and append to the spreadsheet ledger. Idempotent by email message ID. Default every 10 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-composit

name: Weekly Summary
description: Compile the week's expense ledger into a messaging formatted layout summary: total, receipts count, category breakdown with WoW change, top 5 vendors, MTD vs monthly budget with projected month-end, anomalies, pending review items. Archives

name: Experiment Results Analysis
description: Runs daily to detect completed experiments with statistically significant winners, posts a rich messaging summary, and (per ticket-gate) auto-creates or proposes a Linear rollout ticket with priority scaled to lift magnitude. Default weekda

name: Flag Change Monitoring
description: Polls PostHog for flag changes, diffs against cached state, and posts concise formatted messaging layout change notifications to the messaging channel. Silent on first sync. Default every 10 min — final cadence set at the trigger-compositio

name: Stale Flag Digest
description: Scans active flags against a staleness threshold, excludes running-experiment flags and deny-listed prefixes, splits into normal + escalated tiers, and posts a messaging digest with recommended archival actions. Default weekdays 9am (chaine

name: Flag Change Audit
description: Webhook-driven capability. Parses every LaunchDarkly flag event (create / update / toggle / delete / archive), runs collision and naming-convention checks on creation, posts a formatted messaging layout audit card to the messaging channel,

name: Registry Reconciliation
description: Reconciles the full LaunchDarkly flag list against the knowledge base registry. Creates missing entries, marks orphaned entries as 'Archived' with governance notes, and posts a messaging summary. Default monthly on the 1st at 02:00 — final

name: Stale Flag Cleanup

name: Feature Announcement Video

name: finance platform → Sheets Sync

name: Weekly Cash Flow Summary
description: Aggregate the week's finance platform P&L, compute AR aging + top 5 expense categories + WoW deltas, and post a formatted messaging layout summary to the messaging finance channel with a link to the Dashboard sheet. Default Fridays 5:00 PM

name: Congressional Disclosure Scan
description: Scan Capitol Trades (with Senate EFD fallback) for politician stock disclosures in the user's sectors of interest over the last 7 days. Match against the watchlist and surface unusual sector patterns. Route findings to review — 'useful' tag

name: Sector Gem Discovery
description: Find under-covered names in the user's sectors of interest: low analyst coverage + strong technicals + recent news catalyst. Emit a gem event per candidate and a filter event per rejection reason. Route to review — useful/not-useful tags ad

name: Weekly Signal Fetcher
description: Fetch weekly OHLCV + RSI + MACD + news for every ticker on the user's watchlist, compute a composite Buy/Sell/Hold signal, emit strong-outcome events, and route the signal table to human review. Reviewed decisions persist as simulated trade

name: Invoice Template Build
description: One-time build step that renders a branded HTML invoice template from your business details and tests the time-tracking credential so the monthly flow can run unattended. Triggered once during persona creation; not user-scheduled.

name: Monthly Invoice Generation
description: Pull the previous month's billable hours, apply learned rate overrides and billable/non-billable project tags, render one HTML invoice per client from the template, deliver a billing summary via Messages, and route each invoice for human re

name: AI Sprite-Sheet Generation
description: Given an anchor character image and a list of desired animations, produce one normalized PNG sprite sheet per animation. Uses the canvas technique (anchor on left, AI fills frames on right) with a rigorous normalization pipeline (frame spac

name: Image → Animated Short
description: Turn one anchor image into a short animated clip (MP4/WebM). Uses image generation AI's video generator today; swaps to OpenAI's video endpoint when the user's chosen image-AI credential supports video. Output is saved to the user's configu

name: Procedural Idle Breathing
description: Produce a 4-frame breathing idle animation from any character sprite using programmatic pixel shifting. No AI calls — perfectly consistent. Usable independently of uc_generate_sprites: enable alone to add idle polish to sprite sets you alre

name: Codebase Feasibility Analysis

name: Idea Harvesting
description: Weekly scan across configured sources (messaging channels, knowledge base pages, Google Alerts, pasted URL queue). Extract 3-10 concrete candidates per source. Skip vague/meta content. Emit one event per candidate; candidates land in the tr

name: Triage Pipeline
description: For each harvested idea, present to the human with accept/reject affordance. Every decision becomes memory training data so future harvests weight categories accordingly. Accepted ideas trigger the codebase-analysis capability; rejected one

name: Incident Intake & Classification
description: Captures a new incident report with full detail, runs fuzzy-match duplicate detection against open incidents from the last 2 hours, classifies severity by impact (S1/S2/S3/S4), generates the structured record with escalation deadline and up

name: Post-Incident Review
description: For resolved S1 and S2 incidents, waits a configurable settling period (default 24 hours) then generates a structured post-mortem: summary, timeline, impact, root cause, response metrics, action items, lessons learned. Queries memory for re

name: Lifecycle Tracking & Escalation
description: Maintains the live status board for every open incident: processes status updates into the timeline, resets escalation timers, enforces severity-based update cadences, auto-closes stale S4 items, and requests human closure confirmation when

name: Daily Briefing
description: Daily rollup of the past 24h of ingested articles, categorized and ranked, delivered as an HTML email. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default daily 7am.

name: Source Ingestion
description: Poll user-attached sources, dedupe against rolling 30-day index, AI-summarize with importance scoring, log to knowledge base, post breaking news alerts in real-time. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default every 30 minut

name: Inbox Triage & messaging Routing
description: Poll email for unread mail, classify by sender memory + content, and post a formatted summary to the right messaging channels. Updates sender patterns after every processed message. Default polls every 1 minute — final cadence set at the tr

name: knowledge base Databases Tracking
description: For each classified email, create a structured row in the configured knowledge base tracking database. Optional — skipped entirely if the knowledge base connector is disabled at adoption.

name: Invoice Ingest
description: Scan Email with multi-strategy queries, extract structured invoice data from body + attachments, dedupe against the SQLite ledger by message ID, insert with `pending` status, and flag low-confidence or high-value extractions for manual revi

name: Payment Monitor

name: Monthly Deep Audit

name: Weekly Health Audit

name: Evening Completion Processing
description: Detects articles whose Review Status changed to Reviewed since the last run, updates Last Reviewed and Next Due in knowledge base based on each article's frequency, and posts messaging completion shoutouts. Default weekdays 5 PM — final cad

name: Morning Assignment Scan
description: Scans the knowledge base KB for articles due for review, picks reviewers from a rotation (respecting caps and Reviewer Override), sends email reminders, and posts a messaging summary. Default weekdays 9 AM — final cadence set at the trigger

name: Overdue Reminder
description: Detects In-Review articles whose assignment timestamp is >48h old, sends staged follow-ups (gentle at 48-72h, urgent at 72-96h, manager escalation >96h), and records reminder counts in state. Default weekdays 9 AM (part of morning pass) — f

name: Sales Alert
description: Event-listen on `sales.lead.captured` where score ≥ `alert_threshold`. Posts rich formatted messaging layout notification with score breakdown, buying signals, and CRM deep-link. For On Fire leads, additionally DMs the assigned rep with ful

name: Submission Intake & Scoring
description: Receives form tool submissions (webhook primary, polling safety net). Dedups against `processed_responses.json`, scores 0-100 on the 4-factor model calibrated to `sales_motion`, classifies tier, updates/creates CRM record with touchpoints c

name: Personalized Welcome Email
description: Event-listen on `sales.lead.captured`. Drafts and sends a tier-appropriate personalized welcome email via email. Cold/Warm = resource-focused low-pressure. Hot = value-prop with soft call CTA. On Fire = personal from assigned rep with direc

name: Lean Sweep
description: Runs the configured static-analysis CLI in the registered codebase, parses the JSON report, creates backlog ideas for each finding, deduplicates against prior sweeps, and posts a one-line summary. Default cadence is daily 8am — final cadenc

name: LinkedIn Watchlist Sweep
description: Periodic sweep of every LinkedIn company in the watchlist. Calls Bright Data's structured LinkedIn dataset, diffs against per-company snapshot, scores meaningful changes, ships score-≥ threshold alerts in real time. Cadence default 6h.

name: Weekly Watchlist Digest
description: Aggregates every change detected over the past 7 days. Groups by company, ranks within by importance, calls out cross-company patterns (e.g., '3 competitors hired senior MLEs this week'). Default Monday 9am.

name: Niche Business Discovery

name: Pipeline Management

name: Confidence Digest

name: Market Anomaly Watch
description: Scans Kalshi for newly listed markets and anomaly patterns (rapid probability shifts, YES+NO spread deviations, extreme initial pricing). Fetches orderbook depth for flagged markets to distinguish signal from noise. Default daily 07:00 — fi

name: News Correlation
description: For each flagged market from the anomaly watch, queries News API (or web_search fallback) for contextualizing articles. Computes relevance per article (title overlap, timing, source tier, sentiment alignment) and records the top 3 per marke

name: Calendar Watch
description: Polls calendar during work hours, sends contextual prep emails 30 min before meetings, and posts 'in-meeting' status to the messaging channel when meetings start. Maintains per-event state to prevent duplicate actions. Default polling every

name: Daily Briefing
description: Morning summary email of the day's meetings — count, timeline, key attendees, preparation checklist. Initializes meeting state for the day so the calendar watch can operate on fresh entries. Default 08:00 weekdays — final cadence set at the

name: Post-meeting Follow-up
description: After each meeting ends, prompts the user for notes and action items, drafts a follow-up email (routed through manual review for meetings with > 2 attendees), distributes to all attendees, and clears the messaging custom status.

name: Newsletter Issue Curation
description: Fetch configured RSS feeds and web sources, deduplicate against past issues, score and select top articles, group into thematic sections, write editorial commentary, assemble responsive HTML, pass through human review, and deliver via SMTP

name: Deadline Check
description: Scans all active onboarding checklists for upcoming / due-today / overdue tasks, dispatches targeted reminders with three-tier escalation (assignee → manager CC → HR manual review), detects milestone transitions and 90-day completions. Defa

name: New Hire Checklist Setup
description: Detects new employees in the HR database, selects the right role template, and creates a structured knowledge base checklist with role-appropriate tasks across 6 milestones. Handles duplicate detection, fallback to General template with HR

name: Weekly Progress Report
description: Aggregates per-employee metrics across all active onboarding checklists, identifies at-risk hires (3+ overdue OR <50% expected progress), analyzes bottlenecks by task type, and delivers a stakeholder-facing summary to HR and managers. Defau

name: Daily Summary
description: End-of-weekday enrichment summary. Compiles today's processing counts, surfaces the top-3 highest-scored prospects with brief profiles, calls out API issues, and links back to the spreadsheet. Default weekdays 6pm — final cadence set at the

name: Prospect Enrichment Pipeline
description: Short-interval polling pipeline. Reads new prospect rows from the configured spreadsheet, runs each through the five-stage pipeline (verify → person → company → analyse → draft), writes results back to the sheet with status tracking, and em

name: Capture and Route
description: Polls messaging for new messages, classifies each as task/idea/bookmark/note, routes tasks to spreadsheet and others to knowledge base, and replies with a typed confirmation. Default polling every 30 seconds — final cadence set at the trigg

name: Daily Digest
description: End-of-day summary of captures grouped by type, delivered via the messaging channel. Stores the digest in memory for historical trend tracking and clears the day's capture buffer. Default 21:00 daily — final cadence set at the trigger-compo

name: Anomaly Escalation
description: Scores each flagged transaction (amount, unknown merchant, unusual hour, foreign currency, duplicate). High severity (≥5) routes to the messaging channel + email with recommended actions; standard severity to the messaging channel only. Use

name: Transaction Sync & Ledger
description: Pulls new transactions from finance platform, categorizes each, writes rows to the spreadsheet ledger, and updates the monthly budget totals. Flags anomalous charges and emits budget-threshold events when 80% or 100% lines are crossed. Defa

name: Weekly Spending Summary
description: Compiles the past week's transactions from Sheets. Computes total spent, category breakdown, top 5 merchants, week-over-week delta, and per-category budget utilization. Delivers condensed messaging summary + detailed HTML email report. Defa

name: Meeting Prep
description: Detect external meetings in the next 48 hours, enrich each attendee via LinkedIn + email history, build behavioral profiles, and write a structured knowledge base prep page. Skip internal-only meetings. Use the 14-day profile cache to avoid

name: Post-Meeting Feedback
description: After each prepped meeting's end time, send a 1-4 rating prompt via messaging. Store the rating and notes. Feed repeated misclassifications into the calibration ledger so next week's classifiers sharpen. Default every 15 minutes — final cad

name: Pre-Meeting Reminder
description: Monitor prepped meetings and deliver a one-liner T-30 brief via the messaging channel with primary style, lead action, key avoidance, and knowledge base link. Default minute-polling so delivery lands within one minute of T-30 — final cadenc

name: Daily Briefing
description: Pulls yesterday's core metrics from the analytics tool, compares against goals + 7d/30d baselines + WoW, flags anomalies, assigns health status, delivers a plain-English briefing. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default

name: Longitudinal Log

name: Scan & Enrich Implementation Opportunities
description: Weekly scan across configured email senders. Extracts URLs, enriches each via web fetch (with web_search fallback), classifies into new_connector / api_version / tooling, computes relevance from topic-preference memory. Cadence is managed a

name: Triage

name: Baseline Refresh

name: Event Routing & Anomaly Detection

name: Weekly Digest

name: Offer Approval & Dispatch

name: Stage Transition Processing
description: Poll HR platform for candidate stage changes. For each transition, send the stage-appropriate personalized email (acknowledgment, interview prep, rejection) via email and post a privacy-safe update to the hiring messaging channels. Offer-st

name: Weekly Funnel Report
description: Compile 7-day recruiting metrics from HR platform — funnel counts, stage conversion rates, time-in-stage, week-over-week deltas. Deliver via the messaging channel + email and archive a snapshot for trend analysis. Default Monday 09:00 local

name: social platform Trend Digest

name: Feed Scanning
description: Scheduled scan of configured RSS/Atom feeds. Deduplicates, age-filters, and runs each new item through the curation pipeline. Caps per run to keep API usage predictable. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default daily 8am.

name: Manual Curation
description: User submits one or more URLs; persona fetches, summarizes, tags, discovers cross-references, and creates a structured KB page for each. Trigger is manual — invoked on demand.

name: Weekly Maintenance
description: Weekly audit: orphaned-page detection, taxonomy consolidation suggestions, curation stats. Doesn't mutate automatically — surfaces suggestions via Messages for human action. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default Friday

name: Paper Discovery

name: Trend Analysis

name: Payment Event Scan & Scoring

name: Daily Revenue Summary

name: Payment Recovery Sequence

name: Subscription Event Sync

name: Classify and Route

name: Manage Rules
description: Parses natural-language rule updates from the user ('Route Shopify to #ecommerce'), rewrites `routing_rules.json`, and confirms the diff. The rules take effect on the next webhook.

name: Stage Response

name: Stale Deal Watch

name: Weekly Pipeline Report
description: Monday morning pipeline health report: total value, weighted value, stage conversion rates, deals won / lost / created this week, notable patterns. Default Monday 08:00 — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.

name: Proposal Generation

name: Scheduled Full Scan

name: Daily Memory Flush

name: Session Capture
description: Event-listen on persona.execution.completed. Drains the hooks sidecar queue for this persona's exec_dir, extracts decisions / gotchas / follow-ups / file references from each referenced transcript, and stores them as raw-tagged agent memori

name: Weekly Memory Health Check
description: Scheduled capability. Audits the persona's memory layer for stale articles, contradictory pairs, and coverage gaps. Optionally also lints the Obsidian vault via obsidian_brain_lint_vault when configured. Surfaces issues via manual_review —

name: Sentry Issue Scan
description: Queries Sentry for unresolved issues in scoped projects over the lookback window, filters by severity threshold, applies memory to auto-deprioritize known-noise patterns, and emits qualified issues to the root-cause capability. Default dail

name: Codebase Root Cause Analysis

name: Daily Digest
description: Compile daily sales metrics (revenue, orders, AOV, top 5 products, units sold, refunds, net revenue), compare against 7-day rolling average with ↑↓ indicators, and deliver to the digest channel. Default 21:00 daily — final cadence set at th

name: Inventory Watch

name: Refund Watch
description: Poll for new refunds, log each to the spreadsheet Refunds tab, and alert on refunds >$100 or when the reason indicates a product quality issue. Default every minute — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.

name: Skill-Update Issue Writer

name: Branded Design Batch

description: Export selected Canva designs as downloadable PNG/PDF files. Listens for selection events from uc_design_batch (or runs on manual request) and delivers download links via Messages, with edit URL fallback on export timeout.

name: Dunning Sequence

name: finance platform Event Sync

name: Monthly MRR Report

name: Daily Escalation Digest
description: Queries knowledge base for today's escalations plus 7-day history, compiles stats (counts, tier breakdown, top offenders, avg breach duration, WoW trend), and emails a styled HTML digest to the support lead. Default weekdays 6 PM — final ca

name: SLA Breach Watch & Escalation
description: Polls support platform for tickets approaching or past SLA, classifies severity by tier, enriches with repeat-offender + agent-overload patterns, posts formatted messaging layout escalations to the messaging channel (DM to lead on Critical)

name: Knowledge Base Enrichment
description: On ticket resolution, extracts problem + root_cause + resolution_steps, updates the matching knowledge base KB entry (increment Frequency, update Last Used) or creates a new one. Event-listens on support platform ticket status transitioning

name: SLA Breach Prevention
description: Evaluates tracked critical/high tickets against SLA thresholds and sends a single proactive warning when remaining time crosses into the warning window. Default every 60 seconds (paired with triage) — final cadence set at the trigger-compos

name: Ticket Triage & Routing
description: Polls support platform for new/updated tickets, classifies sentiment + urgency, searches the knowledge base KB for matching resolutions, and routes per the urgency × KB-match matrix. Default every 60 seconds — final cadence set at the trigg

name: Deliver Report
description: Composes the structured insight report from analysis results and delivers via in-app messaging, optionally archiving to knowledge base. Updates baselines so the next run's trend comparison is accurate.

name: Process and Analyze
description: Queries the database for new responses, validates and normalizes, runs sentiment + theme + NPS analysis, compares against rolling baselines, and flags anomalies. Default daily 09:00 — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.

name: Process Responses
description: Polls the Google Form's linked sheet, scores each new response, writes enriched records to spreadsheet, and broadcasts tier-aware summaries to the messaging channel (routing detractors to a support channel). Default polling every 2 minutes

name: Send Follow-up Email
description: Consumes processed responses and sends the tier-appropriate follow-up email (Promoter / Neutral / Detractor). Failed sends queue for retry.

name: Code Linking

name: Decision Intake

name: Review Cycle
description: Periodic review of accepted ADRs: checks whether constraints still hold, presents a review batch with Reaffirm / Re-evaluate / Deprecate options, archives stale deprecated decisions. Default weekly Monday 09:00 — final cadence set at the tr

name: Destructive Action Confirmation

name: Daily Ops Summary
description: Compiles a daily rollup of commands executed (by type), current service health, recent deployments, incidents, top operators, and any pending confirmations (should be zero). Posted to Telegram and the secondary messaging channel; archived t

name: User Deletion & Offboarding

name: Email Change Propagation

name: Onboarding Drip Sequence
description: Scheduled capability. Reads onboarding state files, advances each user's drip stage by time-since-signup (Day-1 @ 24h, Day-3 @ 72h, Day-7 @ 168h), sends the appropriate email via email, PATCHes Supabase onboarding_step, updates the state fi

name: User Signup
description: Webhook-driven capability. Processes auth provider user.created events. Verifies Svix signature, provisions the user in Supabase (idempotent), posts a celebration to the messaging channel, sends a welcome email via email, and initializes th

name: Journal Reflection
description: Watches the configured Obsidian vault's `Daily/` folder. When a new daily note appears or an existing one grows by enough characters, reads the entry, walks the vault for grounded context, checks pattern memory for recurring themes, and app

name: Journal Rescan
description: Manual capability. User invokes against a specific date — typically after they've added new content to a daily note that was already coached and want a fresh reflection. Replaces the existing `## Coach` section in place rather than appendin

name: Weekly Pattern Digest
description: Optional capability — only runs when enable_messages_digest is true. Once a week, walks pattern memories from the last N weeks, clusters by keyword overlap, surfaces clusters that exceed the recurrence floor and haven't been digested before

name: Brand Asset Generation
description: Load the design.md brief, compose a prompt from the design DNA + memory layer, generate images via the image AI, evaluate with the multimodal AI in a quality loop (max 3 cycles), deliver via Messages, and gate on human review (max 3 iterati

name: Design Brief Generation
description: Produce the structured design.md brief (five sections: empathy, sensory aesthetic, four-role color hierarchy, typography hierarchy, layout metaphor + do's/don'ts) stored at `design_context.design_files['design.md']`. Runs once at persona bu

name: Paid-Organic Cannibalization Watch
description: Cross-reference paid keyword bids with organic ranking positions. When a keyword already ranks top-3 organically, the paid spend is likely cannibalizing — surface with calculated weekly savings opportunity.

name: Free Promotion Source Discovery
description: Discovers free promotion surfaces — forums, subreddits, newsletters, indie-dev communities, Hacker News threads, Product Hunt waitlists — grounded in the app's own codebase README + package metadata so suggestions actually match what the pr

name: Optimization Proposals
description: Turn the performance scan into 5-8 specific, actionable optimization proposals. Each carries data-grounded rationale, expected impact estimate, and priority. Presented for human review; accepted items enter the user's backlog via the emitte

name: Cross-Channel Performance Scan
description: Weekly scan of paid campaign and organic analytics metrics. Computes WoW deltas against a 4-week rolling baseline and produces the performance section of the Monday briefing. Does not propose changes — hands off to uc_optimization_proposals

name: Competitor Comparison
description: Score competitor URLs with the same 8-category weighted system and produce a side-by-side comparison section appended to the audit report. Highlights where the target beats competitors and where it falls behind. Only runs when competitor UR

name: Website Conversion Audit

name: Portfolio Re-audit
description: Scheduled re-audit of all previously audited sites at quick depth. Compare against prior scores, flag ≥3-point improvements and regressions, deliver a change summary via messaging. Default Monday 09:00 — final cadence set at the trigger-com

name: Single Site Audit
description: Crawl one business website (homepage + optional subpages + mobile viewport), score 10 conversion dimensions with evidence, compose structured audit report, and optionally generate a ready-to-paste redesign prompt for AI website builders. Ma

name: Landscape Report
description: Aggregates all classified rows into a structured market landscape report: industry breakdown, audience distribution, business model patterns, tech landscape, white-space opportunities, common positioning themes. Delivers via Messages and ar

name: Profile URLs
description: Read URLs from the source list, fetch each site in rate-limited batches, apply 7-dimension classification, write results back. Handles paywalls, login walls, JS-rendered pages, and duplicates gracefully. Cadence is managed at the trigger-co

name: Error Classification
description: AI-classifies each ingested error across four dimensions: category (one of 7), root cause (pattern + dependency + temporal correlation), impact (blast radius + severity), and remediation (specific actionable fix). Stores classification back

name: Error Event Ingestion
description: Subscribes to platform error events from every persona and polls the execution API every 10 minutes to catch silent failures. Normalizes each error into a structured record, deduplicates within a 1-hour window, and appends to the 90-day rol

name: Cross-Workflow Pattern Detection
description: Runs four pattern checks on each classified error: recurring (same pattern 3+ in 1h), cascading (dependent persona fails within 15m), time-based clustering, service-wide outage (3+ personas on same service in 30m). Sends real-time critical

name: Daily Digest & Weekly Reliability Report
description: Compiles the daily error digest (totals, per-persona, per-category, trending, top remediation) and the weekly reliability report (error rate per persona, MTTR by category, week-over-week delta, top 3 recommendations, dependency risk map). P

name: 3-Pass Cut Edit
description: Takes raw filmed footage + approved script. VFR normalize → Deepgram transcribe → Pass 1 retake removal (keep final match per script sentence) → Pass 2 n-gram phrase-repeat detection → Pass 3 silence polish. Runs FFmpeg locally.

name: Outline + Titles
description: Takes an approved topic and produces a 5-section outline (hook/problem → solution → demo → results → outro), three title options (curiosity/benefit/identity), and concrete thumbnail direction.

name: Publish Prep
description: From the outline + final video, generate YouTube-ready assets: description (hook-first + chapter timestamps + links), 10-15 tags, chapter markers mapped to final timestamps, end-screen card picks from prior uploads, and a 1-paragraph commun

name: Niche Research
description: Manual trigger with a topic idea. Runs parallel YouTube + Apify + X queries, applies the niche gate (median view count test), produces 5-10 ranked topic candidates with citations.

name: Teleprompter Script
description: Writes a 1,800-2,500 word script in the creator's voice from the approved outline. Applies open loops, loss aversion, micro-payoffs, specificity. Includes [PAUSE], [B-ROLL], [SCREEN] markers. Creator flags voice mismatches — each rejection

name: Codebase Coverage Scan
description: Scheduled scan of the registered codebase. Reads memory for prior coverage progress, picks the next lowest-coverage / untested module, writes the missing tests, validates them with run_tests, and persists updated coverage progress to memory

name: Codebase Bug Hunt
description: Scheduled scan of the registered codebase for likely defects (null/None derefs, missing error handling, unhandled edge cases, resource leaks, security gaps). Reads memory for already-reported issues to avoid duplicates, files each new findi

name: Scheduled Architecture Review
description: Periodic architectural health review of the registered codebase: scan the current architecture, trace cross-module impacts, and produce a concise ADR (context / decision / consequences) plus a story-pointed task breakdown. Reads memory for

name: Idea Architecture Analysis
description: On-demand architectural evaluation of a proposed change or accepted idea: assess fit against the existing architecture, surface risks and trade-offs, and produce an implementation plan (ADR + scoped, story-pointed tasks) ready for a deliver

name: Code Review
description: Reviews target files (or a changeset) for security vulnerabilities, correctness bugs, and quality issues. Every finding cites file:line with a concrete fix; closes with an APPROVE / REQUEST_CHANGES verdict. Reads memory for prior findings s

name: Release Automation
description: When a change merges, applies semantic-versioning rules (MAJOR/MINOR/PATCH) to the merged commits, bumps the version file, prepends a categorized changelog entry, drafts release notes, and tags the release. Records each version decision in

name: On-Demand Security Scan
description: Comprehensive security audit of the registered codebase: dependency-vulnerability analysis, secret/credential detection, and risky-pattern analysis (auth bypasses, PII handling, injection). Findings are severity-ranked with concrete remedia

name: Sync Documentation
description: Analyzes recent commits, identifies functional changes (ignoring formatting/test-only), and updates README sections + the changelog so docs match the shipped code. Reads memory for the last-processed commit so each run only covers new chang

name: PR Test + Merge
description: Reactive review of a pull request Dev Clone opened: check out the PR branch in an isolated git worktree, run the project's tests there, then — per the team's standards/branching policy — enable GitHub native auto-merge (pass + automerge), a

name: Scheduled Scan
description: Primary tracking cycle: sweep sent email threads, detect replies, classify overdue threads into graduated urgency tiers with VIP priority, and deliver a batched messaging reminder. Default every 4 hours — final cadence set at the trigger-co

name: On-demand Status
description: User-triggered full status report of all tracked threads — overdue, within-threshold, and recently resolved — for pre-meeting prep or end-of-day review. Does not advance escalation tiers.

name: Scan and Extract
description: Scans the inbox for unprocessed actionable email, runs three-pass NLP extraction, and emits each candidate with its confidence score for downstream creation or review. Default every 15 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-composition

name: Create or Review
description: Consumes extracted candidates: high-confidence items check knowledge base for duplicates and create tasks; low-confidence items route through human review and train the confidence model. Learns from approve/dismiss decisions.

name: Inbox Scan & Extraction
description: Short-interval email polling loop. Filters non-lead signals, performs multi-layer extraction (header / body / signature), assembles structured lead records with confidence scores, and hands off to the qualification capability. Default every

name: Lead Qualification & Scoring
description: Event-listen on extracted lead candidates. Applies the weighted 4-signal scoring model with contextual adjustments, classifies into tiers, performs three-tier deduplication against the master database, and persists new or updated records. E

name: Human Review
description: Human-in-the-loop capability for On Fire leads (fast-track), potential fuzzy duplicates (merge decision), and low-confidence extractions (verification). Every routing path lands here with full context so the reviewer can act without leaving

name: Change Monitor
description: Poll the CRM for modified Opportunities, compare against stored state, classify urgency per change, and send contextual alerts with business impact and suggested actions. Closed Lost deals trigger a loss-reason manual review. Default every

name: Daily Summary
description: Compile a daily pipeline snapshot: stage distribution, total / weighted values, movement since yesterday, velocity metrics from 90-day transition history, at-risk deals, and top deals to watch. Default 09:00 daily — final cadence set at the

name: Multi-Dimensional Analysis
description: Query the CRM for closed deals in the analysis window. Run seven-dimension segmentation (size, industry, rep, lead source, stakeholders, cycle length, stage progression), cross-dimensional interaction checks for significant findings, and tr

name: Insight Documentation
description: Take the analysis output, rank findings by potential revenue impact, and compose a structured knowledge base report with executive summary, win/loss patterns, trend analysis, and ranked recommendations. Persist each significant finding as a

name: Email Triage & Ticketing
description: Fetches unread email support emails, classifies priority using multi-signal analysis (keywords, sender history, impact language, sender frequency), creates structured knowledge base tickets with priority-tier SLA deadlines, and marks email

name: SLA Monitoring & Escalation
description: Queries knowledge base for open tickets approaching or past their SLA deadline and escalates through warning (80%), critical (90%, unassigned), and breach (100%) stages. Default every 3 minutes (paired with triage) — final cadence set at th

name: Email Triage
description: Polls email for new support emails, matches each against the KB, computes confidence, and routes to auto-reply, human review, or knowledge-gap detection. Default every 3 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.

name: Knowledge Gap Handling
description: For emails where the KB has no relevant article, sends a customer acknowledgment with promised response time, creates a knowledge-gap report for the support team with a suggested article outline, and tracks frequency so recurring gaps escal

name: Daily Activity Report
description: Compiles 24h metrics (total emails, auto-reply rate, approval rate, top categories, new gaps, confidence trend) and delivers to the configured channel. Default 9 AM daily — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
